name: wildcatter
description: Wildcatter — Unit 6 Texas History economy game (TEKS 7.7A, 7.7B, 7.1B, 7.12B). Drill the Texas oil boom as an independent wildcatter, 1901–1931, through six eras while a scripted oil-price ticker spikes and crashes no matter how well you play (solo, one class-wide group) — over a server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center reporting one class-wide accuracy group.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
